title: Integrated Villages
description: Overhauling vanilla villages with heavily detailed and integrated ones
body:
## FOR FORGE & FABRIC 1.20.1, 1.21.1

### Required Mods:
Integrated API
Create
Supplementaries

### Highly Reccomended Mods:
Farmer's Delight
Villager Guards
Quark

### Full List of Optionally Integrated Mods:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
- Alex's Mobs
- Better Archeology
- Biomes O' Plenty
- Bountiful
- Cloud Storage 
- Chipped
- Chef's Delight
- Create Villagerology
- Domestic Innovation
- Farmer's Delight
- Friends and Foes
- Ice and Fire
- Let's do Bakery
- Let's do Vinery
- Mana and Artifice
- Monobank
- More Villages
- Paragliders
- Regions Unexplored
- Sawmill
- Simply Cats
- Quark
- Villagers Plus
- Villager Guards 
- Villager Recruits
- Wares
- Waystones

Planned Integrations
- Hexerei
- Immersive Engineering
- Eureka/Valkyrean Skies
- Clockwork

Suggest more mods in the discord!

</details>

![All 6 of the first villages added in the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4915b4e7850ce91baf9015325c738505db5f69cc.png)

## WHAT IS INTEGRATED VILLAGES?
 Integrated Villages is the third mod in the Integrated Structures series. Not only does it completely overhaul the boring old Minecraft Villages with tons of heavily detailed houses to explore, but it integrates Supplementaries/Quark decorations and Create mod doors, puzzles, traps, and over 30 other mods. I got sick of installing structure mods into a pack and roaming the world, only to find vanilla items and nothing of difficulty anywhere. I love detailed builds and Create machines, so I decided to make mods that adds exactly what I’ve been missing. Beautiful and challenging dungeons and structures packed with lore that are fully integrated into multiple core mods.

Check out my other mods!
- Integrated Stronghold
- Integrated Dungeons and Structures (IDAS)

## Configuration and optional Integration

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
By default IV disables vanilla villages from spawning, you can change this in the config file.

To configure anything else, download this [https://curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/integrated-villages-configuration](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/integrated-villages-configuration)

To change spawn rates change the spacing and separation in the structures sets. Spacing is the Average distance between two neighboring generation attempts. Value between 0 and 4096
Separation is the Minimum distance in chunks between two neighboring attempts. Value between 0 and 4096. Can't be bigger than spacing

To edit biomes, edit the biome files in tags/worldgen/biome/has structure

To disable structures, remove the structures from the structure set file

To improve compatibility with other structure mods, add structure SETS to the “structure set to avoid” list in each of the tags/worldgen/structure_set files

Configuration for what workstations appear from mods you have installed will be coming soon!

</details>

## Frequently Asked Questions

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Q: What biome mods are compatible?
A: Most biome mods are compatible and integrated including Terralith, BOP, and Regions Unexplored.

Q: Will you backport/update to ___?
A: I will always keep the mod up to date with the newest versions of Minecraft as the dependencies update. It is very unlikely but not impossible for me to do a backport.

Q: Does this mod work with other structures mods?
A: Yes all of Yung's mods, Repurposed Structures and more will all work with zero issues. 


Q: Can I use this mod in a modpack?
A: Yes! I would love it if this mod gets used in packs.
 

Q: Can this mod be only on the server-side?
A: No, due to its custom music discs and soundtrack, and changes to client side structure blocks
</details>


I’ve spent over 1000 hours on my mods. I learned Java specifically for this. If you've enjoyed my projects a ton, two great ways to support me are through Patreon directly, or buying your server through Bisect Hosting.
